22 extern "C" Arcane::ISubDomain* _arcaneGetDefaultSubDomain();

27 BEGIN_ARCGEOSIM_NAMESPACE
28 
29 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
30 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
31 
32 EventBasics::
33 EventBasics(Arcane::String name,
34  Arcane::Real date,
35  Arcane::Integer entry_points,
36  Arcane::Integer types)
37  : Arcane::TraceAccessor(_arcaneGetDefaultSubDomain()->traceMng())
38  , TimeVariables(_arcaneGetDefaultSubDomain())
39  , m_name(name)
40  , m_start_date(date)
41  , m_end_date(date)
42  , m_entry_points(entry_points)
43  , m_types(types)
44  , m_observable(NULL) {}
45 
46 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
47 
48 EventBasics::
49 EventBasics(Arcane::String name,
50  Arcane::Real start_date,
51  Arcane::Real end_date,
52  Arcane::Integer entry_points,
53  Arcane::Integer types)
54  : Arcane::TraceAccessor(_arcaneGetDefaultSubDomain()->traceMng())
55  , TimeVariables(_arcaneGetDefaultSubDomain())
56  , m_name(name)
57  , m_start_date(start_date)
58  , m_end_date(end_date)
59  , m_entry_points(entry_points)
60  , m_types(types)
61  , m_observable(NULL) {}
62 
63 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
64 
65 void
66 EventBasics::
67 attachObservable(TimeStep::IObservable* observable)
68 {
69  ARCANE_ASSERT((observable != NULL),("ITimeStepObservable pointer null"));
70 
71  m_observable = observable;
72 }
73 
74 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
75 
76 void
77 EventBasics::
78 notify(const TimeStep::EntryPoint& entry_point)
79 {
80  if(not(entry_point & m_entry_points)) return;
81 
82  const Arcane::Real time =
83  (entry_point == TimeStep::BeforeRestoreSave()) ? m_time() : m_time_n();
84 
85  if( (time == m_start_date) ||
86  ((time > m_start_date) && (time < m_end_date)))
87  execute();
88 }
89 
90 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
91 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
92 
93 END_ARCGEOSIM_NAMESPACE
